# GitHub Copilot instructions

> Author: Rafael Felsemburg · Skill: Competitive Feature Matrix v1.0

This repository includes the Competitive Feature Matrix skill at
`skill/competitive-feature-matrix/SKILL.md`.

When the user asks to compare competitor features, run a feature gap analysis,
survey the major players in a segment, decide what to build next, or rank
product features into a decision matrix, follow that skill file and its
`references/`.

Always: ask the scoping questions first (product, segment, core problem,
competitors to include, any feature to force-validate); present the discovered
competitor list and wait for the user's approval before analyzing features;
produce the full marked matrix (each competitor marked per feature, one-line
descriptions, and a plain-language "how to read this" block) plus the decision
view; and force any user-requested feature into its own matrix row even at 0%
adoption.
